query:
SELECT ga.code AS gaCode, ga.nameEn AS gaName, ga.sortOrder AS gaSort,
       c.code AS compCode, c.nameEn AS compName, c.sortOrder AS compSort
FROM graduateAttributes ga
LEFT JOIN competencies c ON c.gaId = ga.id
ORDER BY ga.sortOrder, c.sortOrder;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 582RunNG3RGjvE7.85f193ee7630 --database DF8hhJErzDeZBFGeijL5fW --execute SELECT ga.code AS gaCode, ga.nameEn AS gaName, ga.sortOrder AS gaSort,
       c.code AS compCode, c.nameEn AS compName, c.sortOrder AS compSort
FROM graduateAttributes ga
LEFT JOIN competencies c ON c.gaId = ga.id
ORDER BY ga.sortOrder, c.sortOrder;
